title: Immersive Ultra
description: Start your immersive Minecraft journey here!
body:
Start your immersive Minecraft journey here!

Immersive Ultra is a modpack designed for game immersion. Perhaps you're tired of modpacks with lots of repetitive gameplay mods, or you prefer not to alter vanilla too much. Immersive Ultra doesn't add many extra gameplay features; instead, it focuses on making the original game more immersive. If you have any suggestions for the modpack, don't hesitate to share them!
